item.label: standard-0009-planning-enhancement-impl
item.summary: Implement standard-0009 planning layer enhancement impact analysis

body:
# Description

Implement standard-0009 planning layer enhancement impact analysis.

# Cancellation Reason

This task was created as a generic placeholder during request-19 compliance review but lacks actionable content. The task description is too vague to be actionable - it references implementing impact analysis without specifying:
- Which specific enhancements need analysis
- What impact criteria should be evaluated
- What deliverables are expected

Standard-0009 compliance issues that were found during request-19 have already been addressed through specific, actionable tasks (task-0267 through task-0279).

# Next Steps

No action required. Any remaining standard-0009 compliance issues should be addressed through specific, file-level tasks with clear acceptance criteria.
